answers.question: What Python command is used to show text or messages on the screen?

What is the main job of a variable in Python?

options.A: To save or store information so the program can remember it later
options.B: To delete files from the computer
options.C: To change the color of the screen automatically
options.D: To stop the program from running

answers.question: Look at this line of code: score = 10. Which part is the name of the variable?

options.D: It doesn't have a variable name
